title: alangium chinense
intro: Alangium chinense, also known as the Chinese alangium or sweet alangium, is a plant species native to East Asia, belonging to the family Cornaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds, which have been found to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Alangium chinense is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in some herbal supplements and traditional remedies.
